_comment: Fingerprint for the partial-drop click pattern (early-warning shape of the disabled-button bug class). Asserts trace-inspect --partial-drops still recognizes 4/4/2-style drops on this fixture. Note: the fixture deliberately does NOT trigger --dead-end-clicks (click > 0), so this fingerprint also serves as a negative control for that detector.
rationale: Partial drops are the early-warning version of dead-end clicks. If this fingerprint stops matching, our detector either over-tightened (filtered out a legitimate partial-drop pattern) or missed the case entirely.
